_comment: English error messages. Keys mirror errors.ar.json exactly.
http.403: You do not have permission to perform this action
http.404: The requested resource was not found
http.429: Too many requests, please try again later
http.500: An internal server error occurred, please try again later
Admins only: This action is restricted to administrators
Insufficient permissions: You do not have sufficient permissions
No party linked to this account: No party is linked to this account
Related record not found: One of the linked records (e.g. treasury or party) was not found
Too Many Requests: Too many requests, please try again later
